{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163934036CFEAD2798DCB2EC38"}"},"total":671},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7437600784598844184","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"幽默 轻松 的斩神 很少见 比那些简介上写着爽文 补遗憾  实际上换汤不换药 围绕着原著无法变动的 要好的很 加油作者 你 很好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731716272,"group_id":"7429062630578326590","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzAPHFmLvQTiIyHCfF+OyLzVGqjD9M+nAJ9N4vfr7b2I","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p9-passport.byteacctimg.com/img/mosaic-legacy/3796/2975850990~120x256.image","user_id":"3987253559559876","user_name":"军姜800"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3987253559559876","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7429062630578326590","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神＋一拳超人+无敌+发癫＋有糖无刀+基情满满】
穿越斩神世界，白玉获得一拳超人的能力。
只要按照埼玉锻炼法，每一天实力就会提升一倍！
当别人还在‘盏’‘池’‘川’按部就班提升实力的时候。
他秃了，也强了。
沧南大劫，因陀罗携神威降临！
刚说出逼格满满的“凡人！交出湿婆怨！”
就被白玉随手扔到了M78星云。
什么？沧南马上就要覆灭了？
白玉：“出现吧，神龙！实现我的愿望！”
林七夜：“外神！你们不可能从我们手中夺走任何东西！。”
林七夜：“家人们，谁懂啊，白玉带来的安全感，真的是爱惨了。”
迦蓝：“我重生了，这一世我不用背负任何责任，我只需要追求我的爱情，诶？等等，林七夜你怎么不看我？”
百里胖胖：“这一世，我不当天尊，我要当财阀！莫莉老婆，三年生四个没问题吧。”
白玉：“这就是斩神的世界么？真是没有一点难度呢。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d9375b2fbbb7fb6cc5fd14536c103c16","author":"温热的尸体","author_id":"","book_id":"7429062630578326590","book_name":"斩神：一拳超人，游戏斩神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5670人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7429062839484023358","read_count":"5670","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1171123"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"551","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,无敌,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/28635da48bb77ef0f632d68911895562~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439174&x-signature=tdxw4k6wbLSllj5I61gW83WKDsw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4176395546409532","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163934036CFEAD2798DCB2EC38"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwa
